# omv_nfs_share (Resource)

An OpenMediaVault NFS export (NFS.setShare).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omv_filesystems" "all" {}

resource "omv_shared_folder" "example" {
  name      = "example"
  comment   = "example share"
  mntentref = data.omv_filesystems.all.filesystems[0].uuid
}

resource "omv_nfs_share" "example" {
  sharedfolderref = omv_shared_folder.example.uuid
  client          = "*"
  options         = "rw"
  extraoptions    = "insecure,no_root_squash,subtree_check,sync"
  comment         = "example share"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sharedfolderref` (String) UUID of the shared folder to export (typically omv_shared_folder.x.uuid).

### Optional

- `client` (String) Allowed client(s). Default '*'.
- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `extraoptions` (String) Extra NFS options.
- `options` (String) NFS options. Default 'rw'.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) OMV-assigned NFS export UUID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# NFS exports are imported by their OMV UUID.
terraform import omv_nfs_share.example 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
```
